title: Seasonal Spaces
description: Friend play modpack for private WooferSMP & for others
body:
# Seasonal Spaces

Project progress started at 11/06/2023 ( 4 PM Central European Summer Time)

## 📖 What is this modpack?

Seasonal Spaces is Fabric modpack for 1.20 version of Minecraft. We wil carefully choose greatest mods and best matching content. Now we are in starting stage of this pack but expect more in future (it depends on mod updates + free time as I (lunekiska) have job and this is my game hobby project)

## ✅ Features:

- Custom and original world generation and stuctures (soon)
- Custom recipes and content using KubeJS or CraftTweaker (when update comes) or later more compatible scripting mod (if it will happen to exist)
- Some other datapcks to improve playing experience (in progress)
- Texture packs to improve visuals (copyright notices below)
- Optimalization mods
- Most of Optifine features included (when mods will be updated)
- Fabric Seasons mod with incoming compatibility(when some mods releases for 1.20)
